profile.name: Haochen "Harry" Li
profile.title: AI Engineer — Agentic Systems & Applied LLMs

courses: Large Language Model for Generative AI

educationFull.degree: Bachelor of Science, Computer Science & Actuarial Science

bullets: Built the company's first AI customer support channel from scratch — production agentic RAG chatbot on Chatwoot + n8n + LangChain multi-LLM pipeline (Llama 3.1 70B + GPT-OSS-120B on Groq). ~80% autonomous resolution, −40% simple email inquiries, 280:1 revenue-to-token-cost.

Cold-started a Pinecone vector store from internal manuals using OpenAI text-embedding-003, LLM-powered query augmentation, and a weekly curation workflow — 95%+ coverage, 100% factual accuracy on course queries.
Engineered custom agentic tools for real-time zip/date course search and e-certificate retrieval by email (100% tool accuracy on structured inputs).

Designed & deployed a full-stack scheduling platform (Spring Boot + React + MySQL + AWS EC2) with drag-and-drop calendar and unified instructor-ID system for parallel AHA/ARC programs — 50%+ faster scheduling cycle.
Python-based Prophet-to-Excel formula conversion tool using binomial-tree algorithms — 50%+ reduction in manual actuarial model conversion time.
Automated Python web-scraping pipeline for bond yield cross-checking — up to 80% reduction in ingestion time with accurate recording.
Owned key metrics + actuarial valuation visualizations across product groups; automated monthly reporting via Python + Excel VBA, delivering reports to Chief Actuary and CEO.

projects.title: Blue-Devil-ChatBot
projects.description: An agentic AI chatbot for Duke knowledge retrieval, built on the LangGraph framework with a multi-tool toolbox: existing API calls, targeted web scraping, and Tavily-powered open web search. Focus is on production-grade API orchestration and agentic search reasoning.

projects.title: Text-to-SQL · DeepSeek LoRA
projects.description: Fine-tuned a distilled DeepSeek model on the BIRD dataset with LoRA — boosting execution accuracy by 50% on simple queries without degrading medium-difficulty performance. Resolved severe GPU-memory constraints via an Unsloth pipeline with 8-bit quantization and Bfloat16 mixed-precision to prevent OOM and ensure stable convergence. Trades headroom on the hardest queries for meaningful wins on the everyday-analytics use cases real users actually hit.

projects.title: Pido-AI-Pet
projects.description: An edge-native AI pet robot living entirely on a Raspberry Pi 4B — tracking and following its owner, interpreting voice commands (“barks”), expressing emotions on an LCD, and actuating a tail + chassis via battery-powered motor and servo stack. Designed for comfort and companionship, fully offline.

projects.title: Stock-Market-Transformer
projects.description: A deep-learning pipeline for stock prediction fusing autoencoder-based market-state embeddings with a Transformer enhanced by Mixture-of-Experts and multi-head attention. Deployed a working Streamlit app delivering short-horizon opening-price forecasts, with a roadmap for broader targets and tighter loss.

projects.title: Dual-Stream-Emotion-XAI
projects.description: A dual-stream emotion analysis + XAI dashboard: Wav2Vec2 for acoustic emotion, RoBERTa + Whisper ASR for semantic sentiment, and PCA-based latent-space visualizations contrasting “how you sound” vs. “what you say” in side-by-side 3D embeddings. Surfaces clusters, nearest neighbors, and cross-modal conflicts (e.g., sarcasm).

projects.title: Sentinel-AI
projects.description: An AI-native Anti-Money-Laundering engine for blockchain wallets scoring risk in real time over 1B+ on-chain transactions — USDT/USDC flows (~$2.9T monthly volume). Combines BigQuery-scale feature extraction with gradient-boosted models to flag high-risk entities across transaction graphs, smart-contract relationships, and KYC activity. Academic Award, 2025 FINOS DTCC Hackathon.

projects.title: FlashBack
projects.description: An end-to-end, memory-augmented personal AI on a Raspberry Pi with camera and mic — continuously capturing first-person lifelog video. A Flask + GCP backend syncs audio–video to cloud storage and exposes a Gemini-powered API so users can query past in-person interactions (who you met, what you discussed, when). 1st place, Education track — 2024 Duke AI Hackathon.

projects.title: Gosvea Agentic RAG Chatbot
projects.description: Company's first AI customer-support channel — a production agentic RAG chatbot wiring Chatwoot and n8n to a LangChain multi-LLM pipeline (Llama 3.1 70B + GPT-OSS-120B on Groq). Cold-started a Pinecone vector store from internal manuals with OpenAI text-embedding-003, LLM-powered query augmentation, and a weekly curation loop; custom agentic tools handle real-time zip/date course search and e-certificate retrieval. Achieved ~80% autonomous resolution, −40% simple email inquiries, and a 280:1 revenue-to-token-cost ratio.

projects.title: Gosvea Scheduling Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed an end-to-end scheduling platform with drag-and-drop calendar, automated instructor notifications, and a unified instructor-ID system supporting parallel AHA and ARC certification programs. Cut scheduling cycle time by 50%+ and removed entire classes of hand-off errors between coordinators and instructors.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Slide Architect
projects.description: An autonomous end-to-end multi-agent system that generates compliant presentations by restricting content generation to authorized Pinecone vector databases — enforcing 100% factual integrity. The agentic graph fuses intent understanding, query expansion/rewriting, hybrid search, and reranking to maximize retrieval recall, with a constructor agent translating verified content into structured HTML layouts. A multi-stage Reviewer-Assembler feedback loop hits 96% factual precision; conditional routing trims 40%+ of redundant compute versus full-system resets.

projects.title: Clinical Claim Verifier with RAG
projects.description: A multimodal RAG system for influenza-vaccine clinical-claim verification built on Gemini Vision + ChromaDB. Features layout-aware parsing, contextual chunking, hybrid retrieval, and multi-stage reranking with an LLM-as-judge workflow. Cross-model sensitivity analysis reached 100% overall accuracy at a 0.9 confidence threshold (77% at 0.95), enabling principled operating-point selection for reliable evidence extraction.

blogs.title: How AI Sees Cats — Grad-CAM Visualization
blogs.description: A visual dive into Grad-CAM: how convolutional networks localize evidence for a prediction. Walks through the math, the gradient-hook plumbing, and side-by-side heatmaps on cat photos — including the weird cases where the model 'sees' the wrong fur.

resources.title: CH_01 · Introduction to Machine Learning
resources.description: Core concepts, supervised vs. unsupervised framing, terminology. The opening chapter of the Traditional ML Field Manual — designed as a fast-recall reference rather than a tutorial.

resources.title: CH_02 · Classic Supervised Models Deep Dive
resources.description: Linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, and boosting — with the intuitions and trade-offs that actually matter in practice.

resources.title: CH_03 · Unsupervised Learning
resources.description: K-Means, PCA, and t-SNE — when each is the right tool, and what they quietly assume about your data.

resources.title: CH_04 · Deep Learning
resources.description: Neural networks, backpropagation, and convolutional architectures — bridging the classical toolbox with the modern one.

resources.title: CH_05 · Reinforcement Learning
resources.description: Agents, environments, rewards. Draft transmission — signal not yet stabilized.
